title: wedelia floribunda
intro: Wedelia floribunda, also known as the Mexican daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to Mexico and parts of Central America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Wedelia floribunda include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for a range of applications in natural healing practices.
